name: sonar
description: Codebase cartographer — builds a multi-layered understanding graph for agent situational awareness.

interface.shortDescription: Task briefings, impact analysis, and verification from .sonar artifacts.
interface.longDescription: Use Sonar to orient before coding, inspect impact, verify conventions, and browse a local code knowledge workspace built from .sonar artifacts.
interface.defaultPrompt: Set up Sonar for this repo in Codex.
